violations.description: Ensure the contrast between foreground and background colors meets WCAG 2 AA minimum contrast ratio thresholds
violations.help: Elements must meet minimum color contrast ratio thresholds

violations.description: Ensure elements have alternative text or a role of none or presentation
Ensure <meta name="viewport"> does not disable text scaling and zooming
violations.help: Zooming and scaling must not be disabled

violations.description: Ensure interactive controls are not nested as they are not always announced by screen readers or can cause focus problems for assistive technologies
violations.help: Interactive controls must not be nested

violations.description: Elements marked as presentational should not have global ARIA or tabindex to ensure all screen readers ignore them
violations.help: Ensure elements marked as presentational are consistently ignored

violations.description: Ensure all page content is contained by landmarks
violations.help: All page content should be contained by landmarks
[role="img"] elements must have an alternative text
